name: M4 The Diagnostician Lab
postCreateCommand: curl -fsSL https://install.julialang.org | sh -s -- --yes && export PATH="$HOME/.juliaup/bin:$PATH" && cd /workspaces/$(basename $PWD) && julia --project=. -e 'using Pkg; Pkg.instantiate(); Pkg.precompile()' && julia -e 'using Pkg; Pkg.add("IJulia")' && python3 -m pip install jupyter
